title: Managing stress
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — coping strategies, biofeedback, relaxation, and stress inoculation training.

simpleExplanation.title: Coping under pressure
simpleExplanation.summary: Effective stress management tackles the source of stress or changes how we appraise and respond to it — through training, relaxation, or social support.
steps: Primary appraisal — is this a threat?

sections.content: **Managing stress** (3.4.3) completes 3.4. **Lazarus & Folkman** transactional model is central.
